title: The Warlord Loses Control
description: On pages 17, 18, this part focuses on the royal tomb and the poneglyph. Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Royal Tomb and the Poneglyph sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Nico Robin, King Cobra, Luffy, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Is what you desire... Recorded there?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Time left until palace square explosion:

summary: Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
